## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and next steps for their SEO partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritized content clusters: 1) Payment infrastructure/processing 2) High-risk industries 3) Cross-border payments](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Selected two calibration articles to start: "Swift alternatives" and "How payment APIs support global transfers"](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Need to carefully approach high-risk industry topics (e.g. online gaming) due to sensitivity](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Will conduct additional research on competitors like Nuvei and explore partner-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [160+ content assignments grouped into 6 clusters](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Focused on iGaming, online gaming, trading platforms, exchanges, and online travel agencies](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Aimed at increasing organic traffic and driving conversions/closed deals](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Some overlap between clusters (e.g. compliance and payment security)](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)

### Priority Content Clusters

1.  Payment infrastructure and processing
      - [Even distribution of high-value keywords](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [Highly relevant to Rapyd's business](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
2.  High-risk and niche industry payments
      - [Sensitive topic requiring careful approach](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Terms like "iGaming" acceptable, but avoid explicit gambling terms](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
3.  Cross-border payments and international transactions
      - [Important but slightly lower priority than infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Calibration Articles

[Selected two articles to align on voice, tone, and technical accuracy:](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

1.  "Swift alternatives" (Cross-border category)
      - [Will cover Rapyd's specific alternatives like instant card transfers (Mastercard Send, Visa Direct)](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [Include both disbursement and collection perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
      - [Highlight value for emerging markets](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
2.  "How payment APIs support global transfers" (Payment infrastructure)
      - [Focus on customized workflows for complex use cases (e.g. Uber, online gaming)](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
      - [Emphasize frictionless, seamless integration and embedded fintech](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Surprising lack of content from competitor Nuvei in keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Team will conduct additional research on Nuvei, Adyen, and payFacs/ISOs](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Will examine how competitors approach sensitive terms in high-risk industries](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Language Considerations

  - [Currently optimizing for British English, but seeing traffic drop from US](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Team to investigate whether US or UK English is more effective for target markets](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [7-10 articles per week once calibration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
  - [Mark to lead review process, involving subject matter experts as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)
  - [Will explore options for giving GrowthX direct publishing access to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to start on two calibration articles, sharing drafts early next week](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)
  - [Rapyd team to regroup on partner-focused content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct additional competitor research (Nuvei, Adyen, payFacs/ISOs)](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Investigate US vs. UK English optimization effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [Mark to connect with GrowthX IT about potential CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [Aida to send follow-up questions via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/zaFmpE_7z47Cu95g29z5edgEqPsAr5xU?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
